metadata.title: PRD Mapping: Automated Design Handoff Phase 1

executiveSummary: Translates the Product team's requirement for a 'Zero-Click Design Handoff' into a technical implementation leveraging our external Figma Webhooks, the Agentic Orchestration Harness, and the Polyglot Generation Engine.

requirementMappings.userStory: As a UX Designer, when I publish a component in Figma, I want a React component automatically created in our codebase so developers don't have to build it from scratch.
requirementMappings.technicalTranslation: Implement a webhook ingestion pipeline to capture Figma POST requests, parse the nested node JSON, normalize it into our internal Graph structure, and pass it to the Agentic Harness for React AST generation.
outOfScopeTechnically: Bi-directional sync (Code changes will NOT push back to Figma in Phase 1)
Generation of Vue or Angular components (React only for Phase 1)

requirementMappings.userStory: As an Engineering Manager, I want these automated components to go through our standard review process before hitting production.
requirementMappings.technicalTranslation: The generation engine must not push directly to the `main` branch. It must authenticate with the GitHub API, create a new branch, commit the generated AST, and open a Pull Request tagging the relevant CODEOWNERS.
outOfScopeTechnically: Auto-merging PRs upon successful test passes.

legacyServicesModified: Internal CI/CD Pipeline (adding automated testing for AI-generated PRs)

tasks: Implement Fastify API endpoint for Figma
Set up Dead Letter Queue for failed payloads
Implement PostgreSQL UPSERT logic for the atlas

blockers: Pending InfoSec approval for external webhook routing through the API Gateway

technicalAssumptions.description: Figma's webhook payload contains sufficient CSS metadata (auto-layout, fills, strokes) to generate accurate React styled-components without needing secondary API calls.
technicalAssumptions.validationPlan: Engineering will build a prototype parser script this sprint to analyze 50 diverse production payloads and verify metadata completeness before beginning the main AST work.
